title: Trump warns Iran: 48 hours left in ultimatum
snippet: President Trump warns Iran of having only 48 hours remaining of his 10-day ultimatum to 'MAKE A DEAL or OPEN UP THE HORMUZ STRAIT - before all Hell will reign down on them.'

title: Iran rejected temporary ceasefire, demands permanent end + guarantees
snippet: Iran has rejected any proposal for a temporary ceasefire and demanded a permanent end to the war with clear guarantees that the US won't attack again. - Axios

title: Prediction markets: ceasefire Apr30=18¢, May31=34¢; BTC~$67K
snippet: Prediction markets: US x Iran ceasefire by April 30? 18¢. US x Iran ceasefire by May 31? 34¢. Jet fuel costs skyrocket. BTC holding ~$67K.

title: Trump: F-15E pilot rescued from Iran
snippet: President Trump announces that the second F-15E pilot who was shot down on Friday has been rescued from Iran. 215 replies, 347 RT, 3113 likes, 296K views

title: F-15E crew rescued after heavy firefight, still must exfiltrate
snippet: The second crew member from the downed F-15E has been rescued after a heavy firefight. Missing crew member confirmed rescued but not safe yet as they must still successfully exfiltrate from Iran.

title: Iran overnight strikes on Kuwait/UAE/Bahrain energy infra
snippet: Iran launched overnight drone/missile strikes on Kuwait, UAE, and Bahrain, targeting energy infrastructure. Kuwait Oil Ministry building, power plants, desalination sites hit. UAE gas/energy sites with fires and casualties.

title: T-MINUS 24 HOURS: 1.1% ceasefire odds, Oil $106+, BTC $67K
snippet: T-MINUS 24 HOURS! Trump: '10 days to deal or Hormuz opens', '48 hours real hell awaits Iran', Prediction markets: 1.1% ceasefire odds, Oil at $106+ if escalation

title: China condemns US/Israeli strikes, supports Iran sovereignty
snippet: China condemned US/Israeli strikes on Iran, called civilian protection a 'red line,' urged immediate ceasefire, supports Iran's sovereignty. No military commitment.

title: Strait of Hormuz deadline expires Monday; 20% global oil at stake
snippet: Trump's deadline on the Strait of Hormuz expires Monday. Two downed U.S. aircraft in 48 hours, Kuwait state oil HQ still burning, Iran rejecting every ceasefire framework. Strait = 20% global oil.

title: Oman-Iran meet on Hormuz transit; ceasefire odds drop to 1%
snippet: Oman and Iran meet to discuss transit through Strait of Hormuz amid ceasefire doubts. Ceasefire odds drop to 1%.

title: Iran gives Trump excuse to massively escalate - deadline first hour after futures open tomorrow
snippet: Iran targeted neighbour states' civilian infrastructure. Gives Trump an excuse to massively escalate tomorrow in the timeframe he gave them to make a deal (first hour after futures open tomorrow).

title: Iran FM tells Pakistan: Tehran will defend itself with all capabilities
snippet: Iran FM tells Pakistan that Tehran is determined to defend itself using all capabilities, as the Gulf conflict enters its sixth week with no ceasefire in sight.

title: US Ultimatum: 24 hours left; Trump angry Japan/France negotiating separately
snippet: The US Ultimatum for Iran to accept its demands has 24 hours left. Japan, France are the newest given permission to pass. Trump is said to be Angry that these Countries Negotiated a separate deal with Iran.

title: US begging Iran for 48hr ceasefire - Pete Hegseth accused
snippet: US begging Iran for 48hr ceasefire - mockery of Pete Hegseth and US posture.

title: JCPOA history: Trump tore up Iran deal in previous term
snippet: Iran and US already had nuclear deal torn up by Trump last term; Iran still complied with IAEA rules. They got screwed once already, unlikely to trust US again easily.

title: Analyst: Trump will tweet 'wonderful progress' before markets open
snippet: Expects a tweet from Trump before US markets open about 'wonderful progress' with Iran, trying to spin the Iraq deal as evidence strait is open again. Markets may buy it for a day or two.

title: No Iran tweets from WatcherGuru in past 12 hours
snippet: WatcherGuru's latest Iran-related tweet is from ~07:30 CST today (12 hours ago). Most recent tweet at 19:19 CST is about Bitcoin Easter prices.
